features.name: shift_left_with_concatenated_shift_amount
features.description: Code should include a shift left operation on a large signal where the shift amount is formed by concatenating an expression with a small constant

features.name: shift_amount_from_parameter_arithmetic
features.description: Code should include a shift left operation where the shift amount involves parameter-based arithmetic expressions

features.name: concatenation_zero_extension_in_shift
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a value with 3'd0 used as a shift amount in a shift operation
